name: +1 Weapon
description: You have a bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. The weapon can be any sword, axe, mace, or similar melee weapon.

bonus.note: Applies to both the attack roll and damage roll

activation.description: The magic functions automatically when wielded

notes: This is the entry-level magical weapon. +2 and +3 variants exist at higher rarities. Magical weapons count as magical for the purpose of overcoming resistance to non-magical weapon damage.
